positive: A central, stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic mountain range silhouetted against a dramatic, gradient sunset sky. The peaks should be sharp and angular, resembling crystalline formations, etched with subtle, glowing nebula patterns. Below the mountain, the horizon features a calm, stylized ocean reflecting the intense magenta, deep indigo, and burnt orange colors of the sky. Include stylized constellations and falling stardust represented by small, crisp geometric points. The overall aesthetic should be graphic, clean, and highly scalable for apparel printing, emphasizing strong contrast between the dark foreground and the vibrant background. Vector art quality, high contrast, perfect symmetry, intricate details, deep shadows, ethereal glow, pop art style, celestial mapping.
negative: blurry, amateur, noise, text, signature, watermark, lowres, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, distracting, cropped, asymmetrical, photographic, logo, cartoon, 3d rendering, realistic
